_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: kratos poisson numerical-correctness gate. Mirrors fenics + skfem + ngsolve poisson_mms_convergence. The Kratos catalog template (src/backends/kratos/generators/poisson.py) uses scipy-assembled P1 triangles on a Cartesian unit-square grid for the PDE itself — Kratos handles metadata + I/O only (task #25 tracks switching to the Kratos-native ConvectionDiffusion Application). This gate validates THE CURRENT catalog pattern converges optimally vs u = sin(π·x)·sin(π·y), f = 2π²·sin(π·x)·sin(π·y) on [0,1]². Asserts P1 nx=32 L2 error <= 3e-3, P1 EOC nx=16 → nx=32 in [1.7, 2.3]. Verified on 2026-06-01: P1 nx=32 L2 = 6.77e-4, EOC = 1.999 (essentially perfect — the element-centroid f sample happens to align with the manufactured solution at this resolution).
